languages.text: "Теперь, когда ты освобожден, ты ответишь на мои вопросы?"
"Now that you have been released, will you answer my questions?"
languages.original_text: "Теперь, когда ты освобожден, ты ответишь на мои вопросы?"

traits.locale_text: "Now that you have been released, will you answer my questions?"
"Now that you have been released, will you answer my questions?"
"Now that you have been released, will you answer my questions?"

languages.text: 「あなたは釈放されたので、私の質問に答えるか？」
languages.original_text: "Now that you have been released, will you answer my questions?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは釈放されたので、私の質問に答えていただけますか？」

languages.text: «Ahora que es libre, ¿contestará a mis preguntas?».
languages.original_text: "Now that you have been released, will you answer my questions?"

traits.locale_text: «Ahora que es libre, ¿contestará a mis preguntas?».

languages.text: "Werdet Ihr nun, da Ihr frei seid, meine Fragen beantworten?"
languages.original_text: "Now that you have been released, will you answer my questions?"

traits.locale_text: "Werdet Ihr nun, da Ihr frei seid, meine Fragen beantworten?"

languages.text: « Maintenant que vous êtes libre, allez-vous répondre à mes questions ? »
languages.original_text: "Now that you have been released, will you answer my questions?"

traits.locale_text: « Maintenant que vous êtes libre, allez-vous répondre à mes questions ? »

languages.text: “既然你已脱身，可否回答我的问题？”
languages.original_text: "Now that you have been released, will you answer my questions?"

traits.locale_text: “既然你已脱身，可否回答我的问题？”

languages.text: "Artık serbest olduğuna göre sorularımı cevaplayacak mısın?"
languages.original_text: "Now that you have been released, will you answer my questions?"

traits.locale_text: "Artık serbest olduğuna göre sorularımı cevaplayacak mısın?"
